json_data.title: Data Validation and Integrity Constraints
json_data.reason: Understanding how to enforce rules ensures that replaced table content remains accurate and consistent within the database.

json_data.title: Database Concurrency Control
json_data.reason: This topic explores how to manage simultaneous updates to table content by multiple users without data corruption or inconsistencies.

json_data.title: Automated Schema Evolution and Data Migration
json_data.reason: This advanced topic addresses the complex challenge of managing and transforming table content when the underlying database structure changes over time.
